sections.sectionTitle: Jerusalem A Mawhna leh A Nopsakkikna

verses.text: Ama mite mah nengniamin, thumang loin a tatsia, Jerusalem khuapi in gimna ngah ding hi
Topa' thu ngai nuamlo a, a thuhilhna sang nuamlo hi. Topa muang nuamlo a, a Pasian naih nuamlo hi
A uliante, humpinelkai gilkial bang a, a thukhente, keivom gilkial bang uh hi. Zingsang khuavak mateng a saguh nek a nusia nuamlo, a huaiham gamsate tawh kibang uh hi
A kamsangte kihisak uh a, kamsang citak hilo uh hi. A siampite in a siangtho nate ninsak uh a, amau angsung ding bek a khualna-un Pasian' thukham lehhei uh hi

Ahi zongin tua khuapi sungah Topa omin, a thuman na bek sem a, a khialin gamta ngeilo hi. Zingsang simin mihingte tungah pelh ngeiloin thutang lak hi. Ahi zongin tua lai-a mihing thumanlote, a sia-in gamta teitei uh a, maizumna mel thei theilo uh hi

Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “A kiphasak mite ka nilkhia a, a gal pan'munte uh ka susia hi. A kongzing lampite uh ka kinusiacipsak a, tua lampi kuamah in tawn nawnlo hi. A khuapi uh kisia gawpin kinusia a, a sungah kuamah om nawnlo hi
Tua ahih manin ka mite in kei hong zahtakin ka thuhilhna ngai ding uh a, mangngilhlo ding uh hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi. Ahi zongin a gamtatsiat ngei bangun gamtalai veve uh hi,” a ci hi

Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “Tua ahih ciangin minamte ka mawhsak ni hun dong kei hong ngak phot dih un. Minamte leh kumpi gamte kaikhawmin, ka hehna ka thuaksak ding, ka lungsim ka khensat khin hi. Ka hehluatna meikuang tawh leitung khempeuh kangtum ding hi
“Tua ciangin minamte' lungsim ka hei ding a, amaute in keima tung bekah thu hong ngenin, lungsim kikhatin ka na hong sem ding uh hi
A gamlapi Ethiopia gam pekah a om, a kithehthang ka mite nangawn in biakna hong puak ding uh hi

Tua hun ciangin ka mite in kei nong lehdona hangun maizumna ding bangmah om nawnlo ding hi. Note lak panin a kiphasak, a kihisak mite ka hawlkhia ding a, Jerusalem khua-a ka mual siangtho tungah kei nong lehdo nawn kei ding uh hi
Note lakah a kiniamkhiat, mineute bek, ka suaktasak lai ding a, keima tungah huhna hong ngen ding uh hi

Israel mi a omlai sunte, midangte tungah gilo nawnlo ding uh a, zuauthu gen nawnloin, mi khem ding zong ngaihsun nawnlo ding uh hi. Amaute cithei-in lungmuangin om ding uh a, kuamah kihta nawnloin om ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Zion tanu aw, nakpi takin la sa in la, Israel aw, lungdamin kiko in. Jerusalem tanu aw, na lungsim khempeuh tawh lungdam in
Topa in na galte hong phiatkhiatsak khin a, hong langpang khempeuh hong hawlkhiatsak khin hi. Topa ahi Israel kumpipa nang tawh hong om a, na launa ding bangmah om nawnlo hi
Tua ni ciangin Jerusalem khuapi kiangah, “Zion khuapi aw, lau kei in. Na khut thazawsak kei in,” kici ding hi
Topa na Pasian un note hong ompih a, ama vangliatna in hong gualzosak hi. Note tungah Topa lungkim ding a, ama hong itna tawh hong thakbawl ding hi. Note' hangin Topa lungdamin la sa ding a
pawi hun sungah mi a lungdamte bang ding hi. Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “Note-a' dingin a lauhuai thu ka beisak khin a, na mindaina teng uh kong paihkhiatsak khin hi

En un, tua hun ciangin no a hong bawlsiate gim ka pia ding a, a khebaite honkhia-in, a kipaikhiatpih mite ka ciahpihkik ding hi. Amau' maizumna uh minthan'na ka suaksak ding a, mi khempeuh in amaute a phat ding uh hi
Tua hun ciangin, a kithehthang na mite uh kong kaikhawm ding a, leitung mi khempeuh in note hong phat ding uh hi. A tawpna-ah note na cithei kik ding uh hi,” Topa in ci hi, a ci hi.
